headline: How The Avery Dennison (AVY) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Expectations
summary: Avery Dennison’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$210 to US$205, a trim that slightly narrows the implied upside built into prior assumptions. This move lines up with recent Street research, where some firms have lowered price targets while others have raised them or initiated with a positive stance, providing a mixed but useful read on sentiment. In the sections that follow, you will see how these price target moves fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what that means...
